prompt: The small red-and-white propeller plane flies forward and threads cleanly THROUGH the open loop of the letter D in BUD, its propeller spinning fast, trailing a white smoke trail, while the white skywriting cloud-letters spelling BUD ISLAND drift and softly billow in the breeze. The camera follows the plane for a moment, then slowly cranes and descends past the skywriting down toward the luxury modern villa, pool and turquoise lagoon below — water shimmering, palm trees swaying, soft realistic clouds drifting by, warm golden-hour light and gentle lens flare. Cinematic, photo-realistic, premium travel-film aerial, smooth confident camera move. Uplifting cinematic title-sequence music swell with a light airplane engine hum and a gentle ocean-breeze whoosh.
